title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Hilton India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Hilton India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Hilton India! We are hiring a Reservation Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Hilton India:
Hilton India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hilton India!
